techStack: Go 1.22+, Echo v4, GORM, Casbin RBAC, JWT, Redis, PostgreSQL, testcontainers-go
build: make serve | make migrate | make test | make test-integration | make lint
conventions: SQL migrations (NOT AutoMigrate), soft deletes on all entities, UUID primary keys, context propagation, Envelope response format, two-tier permission (route middleware + scope check)
structure: cmd/api (entry), internal/http (Echo), internal/service (business), internal/repository (GORM), internal/domain (entities), internal/permission (Casbin), internal/auth (JWT), internal/module (domain modules), tests/integration (testcontainers), migrations/*.sql

customNotes.content: Integration tests use testcontainers-go with PostgresContainer and RedisContainer. Run with: go test ./tests/integration/... -tags=integration. Tests auto-start ephemeral Docker containers with runMigrations embedded SQL. Each test gets clean DB via SetupTest().

notes.content: Created 10 AGENTS.md files: root, permission, auth, invoice, integration, migrations, domain, service, repository, http
Each AGENTS.md includes: OVERVIEW, WHERE TO LOOK, CODE MAP, ANTI-PATTERNS, CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS, TROUBLESHOOTING
